use_cases: Adds looping line-drawing animation to Lucide SVG icons using anime.js
Creates animated icon effects for loading states or decorative purposes
Provides animated icon visuals for feature showcases or walkthroughs
ai_summary: A React hook that applies a continuous line-drawing animation effect to Lucide icon SVGs using anime.js. The animation loops indefinitely with an in-out quad easing, creating a drawing/unrawing effect on paths, circles, and polylines. Designed as a reusable utility for adding animated icon visuals to any component or page.
